title: clasp.json Config
description: Configuration file for google/clasp — Command Line Apps Script Projects. See: https://github.com/google/clasp/blob/master/docs/config-files.md

$schema.description: Path to this JSON schema for IDE autocomplete

scriptId.description: Google Apps Script project ID. Found in the editor URL or File > Project properties > Script ID

rootDir.description: Local directory where clasp stores project files. Default: current directory

projectId.description: Google Cloud Platform project ID for advanced APIs

fileExtension.description: [DEPRECATED v3] Use scriptExtensions instead. Local file extension for script files.

scriptExtensions.description: File extensions for local script files. First extension is used when pulling. Default: ['.js', '.gs']

htmlExtensions.description: File extensions for local HTML files. First extension is used when pulling. Default: ['.html']

filePushOrder.description: Files pushed first (for load-order dependencies). Paths relative to .clasp.json (include rootDir if set). Other files pushed after, sorted by name.

skipSubdirectories.description: Force clasp to ignore subdirectories without needing a .claspignore file. Default: false
